name: Nuvio (Unofficial)
subtitle: Full & Enhanced Nuvio builds for AltStore / SideStore.

apps.name: Nuvio
apps.subtitle: Watch your library, anywhere
apps.localizedDescription: Unofficial Full build of Nuvio Mobile for iOS / iPadOS.

versions.localizedDescription:
# 🚀 Release v0.3.1  —  Native P2P streaming comes to iOS

## Upstream changelog:
- fix(navigation): defer route cleanup until pop completes @tapframe
- feat: integrate Nuvio Engine @tapframe
- fix: recycled bitmap crash in Now Playing metadata @KhooLy
- fix(settings): normalize section headings @tapframe
- feat: add separate upcoming continue watching row @tapframe
- fix: apply poster depth to remaining surfaces @tapframe
- feat(library): add sortable shelf and grid layouts @tapframe
- support for split ABI @tapframe

## Enhanced changelog:
- All changes from the upstream
- feat(playback): add adjustable subtitle background transparency @luqmanfadlli 
- fix(ios): subtitle background opacity @luqmanfadlli
- feat: add episode rating toggle in TMDB Enrichment @luqmanfadlli 
-

# 🚀 Release v0.3.0

## Upstream changelog:
- fix(player): update sourceStreamsState to use mutableStateOf @tapframe
- fix(player): make forced subtitle selection audio-aware @tapframe
- fix(player): enforce preferred-language subtitle filtering @tapframe
- fix(player): match forced subtitles to language preferences @tapframe
- feat: add show catalog type option @tapframe
- fix: show player streams progressively @tapframe
- fix: preserve download metadata and nav layout @tapframe
- fix: bound generic Android raw responses @tapframe
- feat(player): match overlays to TV UI @tapframe
- fix(trakt): invalidate rejected refresh tokens @tapframe
- Update AppLanguage.kt @haveAnIssue
- Create strings.xml @haveAnIssue
- feat: modern floating pill navigation bar with scroll-responsive l

# 🚀 Release v0.2.25

## Upstream changelog:
- fix: disable predictive back on Android @tapframe
- ref: remove contribution summary @tapframe

## Enhanced changelog:
- Added Library Grid View @luqmanfadlli
- iOS: Fixed Collection NavBar obstructing catalog filters @luqmanfadlli
- iOS: Auto-hide Liquid Glass NavBar on scroll @luqmanfadlli
- Fixed status bar visibility @luqmanfadlli

---

## Variants

### Nuvio Full
This variant is similar to the official TestFlight version with unlocked Plugins and in-app Trailers.

AltStore/SideStore source:
```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/main/NuvioFull.json
```

### Nuvio Enhanced
This custom variant includes experimental features, quality-of-life improvements, and specific bug fixes not yet avai

# 🚀 Release v0.2.24

## You can now add AltStore/SideStore source
**Nuvio Full:**
```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/main/NuvioFull.json
```
**Nuvio Enhanced:**
```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/main/NuvioEnhanced.json
```

## Upstream changelog:
- Fix and complete Greek translations @nosvasedis
- Update Italian translations @WhiteGiso
- Update Vietnamese translations @khanh71
- Update Parental Guidance API integration @i4mth3d4ng3r
- Add Android Now Playing media controls @luqmanfadlli
- Fix Continue Watching enrichment retries and Up Next logic @tapframe
- Match Trakt Continue Watching behavior with NuvioTV @tapframe
- Fix Android Picture-in-Picture behavior @darkflame91
- Fix library synchronization du

# 🚀 Release v0.2.23

## You can now add AltStore/SideStore source
**Nuvio Full:**
```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/main/NuvioFull.json
```
**Nuvio Enhanced:**
```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/main/NuvioEnhanced.json
```

## Upstream changelog:
* added customizable card depth effects. @tapframe
* Fixed a critical regression that could reset synced profile settings. @tapframe

---

## Variants

### Nuvio Full
This variant is similar to the official TestFlight version with unlocked Plugins and in-app Trailers.

### Nuvio Enhanced
This custom variant includes experimental features, quality-of-life improvements, and specific bug fixes not yet available in the upstream repository.

**Added Features:**

# 🚀 Release v0.2.22

This release is based on the upstream **Nuvio v0.2.22**, see official release details [here](https://github.com/NuvioMedia/NuvioMobile/releases/tag/0.2.22).

---

## Variants

### Nuvio Full
This variant is similar to the official TestFlight version with unlocked Plugins and in-app Trailers.

### Nuvio Enhanced
This custom variant includes experimental features, quality-of-life improvements, and specific bug fixes not yet available in the upstream repository.

**Added Features:**
* Added Now Playing Control in the Notification, Lockscreen, and Widget with media metadata and artwork.
* Added a volume boost feature (up to 200%) for quieter streams.
* Added support for Live TV integrations.
* Added stream quality selection in Player Control.
* Add artwo

# 🚀 Release v0.2.21

This release is based on the upstream **Nuvio v0.2.21**, see official release details [here](https://github.com/NuvioMedia/NuvioMobile/releases/tag/0.2.21).

---

## Variants

### Nuvio Full
This variant is similar to the official TestFlight version with unlocked Plugins and in-app Trailers.

### Nuvio Enhanced
This custom variant includes experimental features, quality-of-life improvements, and specific bug fixes not yet available in the upstream repository.

**Added Features:**
* Added Now Playing Control in the Notification, Lockscreen, and Widget with media metadata and artwork.
* Added a volume boost feature (up to 200%) for quieter streams.
* Added support for Live TV integrations.
* Added stream quality selection in Player Control.
* Add artwo
